name: mewtru
oneLine: Software engineer and Twitch Partner who streams live programming, mostly in TypeScript and React.
bio: Mewtru is an English-speaking Twitch Partner and software engineer who streams live coding sessions, primarily in the Software and Game Development category. Her work centres on TypeScript and React, with on-stream projects including drawydrawing.com and a VSCode extension that exposes editor controls through Twitch channel point redemptions. She is part of Team POGrammers, a coding-streamer collective, and her Twitch account dates to 2015 with regular streaming starting February 2019.
